summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Class Platform Iteration 3 - Enhanced live class platform with dual Google Meet + Zoom integration, attendance tracking, course management, reports & analytics, and payment tracking. Most features working excellently with significant improvements from previous iterations.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: Technically correct behavior - 403 Forbidden is appropriate for authenticated users lacking proper role

ui_bugs.issue: Zoom option not available in class scheduling platform selector
ui_bugs.impact: Cannot test Zoom auto-creation feature through UI
ui_bugs.note: May be intentional due to disabled Zoom credentials

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test teacher/student dashboards due to unknown temporary passwords
integration_issues.impact: Unable to verify join/leave attendance functionality
integration_issues.note: Security feature - temp passwords only shown once during account creation

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@classplatform.com / admin123)
Admin dashboard overview with comprehensive stats (Students: 7, Teachers: 7, Classes: 10+)
All 7 sidebar navigation tabs working (Overview, Teachers, Students, Classes, Courses, Reports, Payments)
Teacher creation with hourly rate via dialog form - all fields working
Student enrollment with all mandatory fields validation working
Google Meet class scheduling with manual link input working perfectly
Course management - create course, assign members to course working
Reports & analytics with filtering - student summary, teacher summary, attendance log
Payment recording with teacher association working
All dialog forms working with proper validation and force-click overlay handling
Responsive design working on desktop (1920x1080), tablet (768x1024), and mobile (390x844)
Purple and white theme implementation consistent across all views
Role-based access control working correctly (403 for unauthorized roles)
Backend API comprehensive test suite: 16/18 tests passed (88.9% success rate)
Zoom status endpoint correctly shows configured but not connected
Zoom class scheduling fails gracefully with proper error handling
Admin logout functionality working
All CRUD operations for teachers, students, courses, classes, payments working
Session management improved - no frequent logouts during testing
Error handling graceful throughout the application
action_item_for_main_agent: OPTIONAL: Consider adding Zoom option back to platform selector with proper error messaging when credentials are disabled. MINOR: Provide a way to test teacher/student dashboards (perhaps with demo accounts or password reset functionality).
